CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(100));
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM test_table WHERE id > 3;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'B%');
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table ORDER BY value) AS subquery;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, ref_value VARCHAR(100));
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(t.value) FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(t.value) FROM test_table t LEFT JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id WHERE a.ref_value IS NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(t.value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table) AS distinct_values;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM test_table WHERE id < 1;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table ORDER BY RAND()) AS random_order;
